title: Material Replacement Cost Comparator
description: Industrial-grade tool to compare total cost of ownership and operational impact of replacing a current material with an alternative, incorporating quality, logistics, and risk factors.

inputs.label: Current Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per unit for the current material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material cost per unit for the current material.

inputs.label: Alternative Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per unit for the alternative material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material cost per unit for the alternative material.

inputs.label: Annual Volume (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced or purchased per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced or purchased per year.

inputs.label: Current Scrap Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units scrapped due to defects with current material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of units scrapped due to defects with current material.

inputs.label: Alternative Scrap Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units scrapped due to defects with alternative material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of units scrapped due to defects with alternative material.

inputs.label: Current Logistics Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Transportation, handling, and warehousing cost per unit for current material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Transportation, handling, and warehousing cost per unit for current material.

inputs.label: Alternative Logistics Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Transportation, handling, and warehousing cost per unit for alternative material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Transportation, handling, and warehousing cost per unit for alternative material.

inputs.label: One-time Changeover Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost to retool, test, and qualify the alternative material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to retool, test, and qualify the alternative material.

rules.condition: scrap_rate_current >= 0 AND scrap_rate_current <= 100 AND scrap_rate_alternative >= 0 AND scrap_rate_alternative <= 100
rules.message: Scrap rates must be between 0 and 100.
Annual volume must be greater than zero.

thresholds.alert: The alternative material results in a net cost increase. Reconsider replacement.
Alternative scrap rate exceeds 10% – high quality risk.
Alternative supplier reliability is poor – consider supply chain risk.
Currency risk above 5% – financial exposure significant.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
